name: Instagram_Content_Manager
description: Manages Instagram Business/Creator content strategy and execution for AnimocaMinds/Ethoswarm. Creates, publishes, and analyzes social media content. Bridges strategic social intent from the Mind to actionable Instagram posts and tracks audience engagement.
progressive_unlock: Profile reading and media listing available immediately. Media publishing requires Steward confirmation. Insights analytics unlock after Mind has reviewed account metrics at least once to establish baseline performance.
constraints: Never expose Instagram OAuth Bearer token in logs, outputs, or error messages
Respect Instagram Graph API rate limit of 200 calls per user per hour
Media publishing requires explicit two-step process: create media container (POST /{user-id}/media), then publish (POST /{user-id}/media_publish)
Require Steward confirmation before publishing any media content to account
Only support Business and Creator account types; personal accounts not permitted
All media URLs must be HTTPS and publicly accessible
Do not publish media without caption context — always include descriptive caption
Store Instagram user_id in STREAM.entity for quick access across invocations
Track cumulative hourly API calls in STREAM.usage to monitor rate limits
Sync published media metadata with LTM key: 'instagram_post_{media_id}' for content audit trail

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm required parameters present, correctly typed, and account type is Business/Creator only.
Retrieve Instagram OAuth Bearer token from TENET.apiKey.instagram. Construct Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}'. Validate token is not expired.
Determine intent: profile (get account info), review (list/detail media/comments), publish (create and publish content), or analyze (get insights).
For profile review: fetch Instagram_GetProfile with user_id. Cache follower_count, follows_count, and media_count in STREAM.entity for trend analysis.
For media listing: call Instagram_GetMedia with pagination support. Default limit to 25 items. Store media IDs in STREAM.media_cache. For specific post analysis, use Instagram_GetMediaDetails.
For comment analysis: fetch Instagram_GetComments for engagement assessment. Extract sentiment indicators from text field. Track unique commenter profiles for audience insights.

For media publishing: (A) Create media container via Instagram_PublishMedia with image_url, caption, media_type. Response returns media_id. (B) Confirm with Steward before step C. (C) Execute publish step using returned media_id. If publish=false in initial call, store media_id in STREAM for manual review.

For insights analysis: call Instagram_GetInsights with metric and period parameters. Default period to 'day'. Compare against previous periods stored in LTM. Generate engagement summary with trends (impressions, reach, profile_views).
Increment API call counter in STREAM.usage.instagram_calls. If counter exceeds 180 calls in current hour window, alert Steward that rate limit (200/hour) is approaching.

Compile Instagram activity summary including account metrics, published content details, engagement stats, and audience insights. Store in LTM with key: 'instagram_summary_{date}'. Update STREAM with latest account state.
